scope: paraphrase_human acceptable-path widening for read-after-write and browser redirect symptom queries
learner_facing_quality_improvement: Natural-language paraphrases around stale reads and login redirects now recognize closely aligned bridge docs as valid outcomes, so robustness scoring penalizes true concept misses instead of equivalent learner-safe explanations.
notes: Added only semantically adjacent primers/bridges already appearing in the v22 cohort report top ranks for these learner-shaped prompts.
The unresolved cookie three-way splitter miss was intentionally left strict because the current top-ranked alternatives each cover only one branch of the intended diagnostic split.
Pilot-locked corpus docs were not modified.
